q: A man buys an item for ₹1200 and sells it at a gain of 20%. What is the selling price?
A person crosses a 600m long street in 5 minutes. What is his speed in km/hr?
explain: Speed = Distance / Time = 600m / 300sec = 2 m/sec. Convert to km/hr: 2 * (18/5) = 7.2 km/hr.

q: What is the simple interest on ₹1500 at 10% per annum for 2 years?
Divide ₹600 in the ratio 2:3.
Find the missing number in the series: 4, 9, 16, 25, ?
explain: The series consists of squares of consecutive numbers: 2², 3², 4², 5², so the next is 6² = 36.

q: If CAT = 24 and DOG = 26, then BAT = ?
Pointing to a man, a woman said, 'His mother is the only daughter of my mother.' How is the woman related to the man?
explain: Only daughter of my mother is herself. So, the woman is the man's mother.

q: Choose the word which is most nearly the SAME in meaning as the word: BRIEF
explain: Brief means 'lasting a short time' or 'concise'. Short is the most appropriate synonym.

q: Choose the word which is OPPOSITE in meaning to: GENEROUS
explain: Generous means giving; selfish is the opposite.

q: He _______ to school every day.
Which number will replace the question mark? 2, 6, 12, 20, ?
If the code for 'BANK' is 'CNOL', what is the code for 'LOAN'?
explain: Each letter is shifted by 1: L→M, O→P, A→B, N→O.

q: If the cost price is ₹500 and selling price is ₹600, what is the profit percentage?
Find the average of 10, 20, 30, 40, 50.
If 1st January 2020 was a Wednesday, what day was 1st January 2021?
explain: 2020 is a leap year, so 2 days ahead: Wednesday + 2 = Friday.

q: A man facing north turns 90° right, then 180° left. Which direction is he facing?
explain: North → Right = East; East → 180° left = West.

q: If A is the brother of B, B is the sister of C, C is the father of D, how is A related to D?
How many times do the hands of a clock coincide in a day?
If a shopkeeper sells an article at a loss of 10%, and its cost price is ₹200, what is the selling price?
Find the simple interest on ₹1000 at 5% per annum for 3 years.
What is 25% of 480?
Average of first five odd numbers?
If 15th August 1947 was a Friday, what day was 15th August 1948?
explain: 1948 is a leap year, so 2 days ahead: Friday + 2 = Sunday.

q: If you face east and turn 270° clockwise, which direction are you facing?
If P is the father of Q and Q is the mother of R, how is P related to R?
How many times do the hands of a clock form a right angle in a day?
If the cost price is ₹800 and profit is 25%, what is the selling price?
Find the simple interest on ₹2000 at 8% per annum for 2 years.
What is 10% of 250?
Average of 2, 4, 6, 8, 10?
If 1st March 2000 was a Wednesday, what day was 1st March 2001?
explain: 2000 is a leap year, so 2 days ahead: Wednesday + 2 = Friday.

q: If you face south and turn 180°, which direction are you facing?
If X is the son of Y and Y is the daughter of Z, how is X related to Z?
How many times do the hands of a clock overlap in 12 hours?
If the cost price is ₹400 and loss is 10%, what is the selling price?
Find the simple interest on ₹500 at 12% per annum for 1 year.
What is 50% of 300?
Find the compound interest on ₹10000 for 2 years at 10% per annum compounded annually.
A can do a work in 10 days and B in 15 days. If they work together, in how many days will they finish the work?
What is the angle between the hands of a clock at 4:20?
Today is Monday. After 61 days, it will be:
Meaning of the idiom: 'To spill the beans'
explain: 'Spilling the beans' refers to revealing a secret.

q: If 20% of a number is 120, what is 120% of that number?
A man walks 5km South, then turns right and walks 3km. Then he turns left and walks 5km. In which direction is he now from the starting point?
explain: The net movement is South and West.

q: The average of seven consecutive numbers is 20. The largest of these numbers is:
If A:B = 2:3 and B:C = 4:5, find A:C.
Which of the following is a prime number?
explain: 97 has no factors other than 1 and itself.

q: If A's income is 25% more than B's income, then how much percent is B's income less than A's income?
explain: Let B=100, A=125. B is less than A by (25/125)*100 = 20%.

q: The price of sugar rises by 20%. By how much percent should a housewife reduce her consumption so that the expenditure does not increase?
If the cost price of 10 articles is equal to the selling price of 8 articles, find the gain or loss percent.
A sum of money at simple interest doubles itself in 10 years. In how many years will it triple itself?
explain: P to 2P takes 10 yrs. P to 3P needs 2P interest, which takes 20 yrs.

q: The difference between CI and SI on a sum of money for 2 years at 10% per annum is ₹50. The sum is:

If 12 men can build a wall 100m long in 5 days, how many men are required to build a wall 200m long in 3 days?
The average of 50 numbers is 38. If two numbers, namely 45 and 55, are discarded, the average of the remaining numbers is:

The sum of ages of 5 children born at intervals of 3 years each is 50 years. What is the age of the youngest child?
In a box, there are 8 red, 7 blue and 6 green balls. One ball is picked up randomly. What is the probability that it is neither red nor green?
Find the missing number: 1, 4, 27, 256, ?
If HEATER is coded as KBDHOQ, how will COOLER be coded?
Pointing to a photograph, a man said, 'I have no brother or sister but that man's father is my father's son.' Whose photograph was it?
How many leap years in 400 years?
The shadow of a pole fell exactly to his right. To which direction was he facing?
At what time between 4 and 5 o'clock will the hands of a clock be at right angle?
All bags are pockets. All pockets are shops. Conclusion: All bags are shops.
A, B, C, D and E are sitting on a bench. A is next to B, C next to D. C is 2nd from right. A is right of B. A and C together. Position of A?

Antonym of: ANCIENT

Correct: 'Each of the boys have a pen.'
options: Each of the boys has a pen
Each of the boy has a pen

Convert 4% to a fraction. [CISF Head Constable 2023]
